subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Verily Thou art the Maker of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever lieth between them, the Knower of all that is hidden and manifest. Nothing escapeth Thy knowledge, whether in the heavens or in the earth or in whatsoever lieth between them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بسم الله الرحمن الرحیم بسم الله الامنع الاقدس. سبحانک اللهم انک انت فاطر السموات و الارض و ما بینهما عالم الغیب والشهادة لن یعزب عن علمک من شیء لا فی السموات و لا فی الارض و لا ما بینهما
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @purpose; goal of creation, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @God's oneness [ahadiyyih and wahidiyyih]
